pages.title: Kabod Coffee – Organic Single-Source Specialty Coffee Roaster in Denver, Colorado – Kabod Coffee is a specialty coffee roaster brand dedicated to offering high-quality, ethically sourced Ethiopian Coffee roasted in small batches in Denver, Colorado.

Unblended.

FROM ETHIOPIA TO THE WORLD

Every Cup Honors
a Thousand-Year
Tradition
A TRUE FARM-TO-CUP EXPERIENCE

Bringing The World Closer to The
World's Best Coffee
UNBLENDED PERFECTION™

Unblended Perfection ®

At Kabod Coffee, this means every cup comes from one specific coffee-growing region in Ethiopia. Never mixed with beans from other regions or countries. Ethiopia, the birthplace of coffee, is world-renowned for its diverse microclimates and heirloom varietals, producing distinct flavor profiles based on altitude, soil, and processing methods.

TASTE THE KABOD DIFFERENCE

Specialty Organic Coffee
100% Single-Source

At Kabod Coffee, every cup begins on small, family-owned farms of heart of Ethiopia — the birthplace of coffee. We proudly source only 100% organic, single-source beans , meaning each harvest comes from one distinct region and is never blended with coffee from other farms or regions. This commitment preserves the unique flavor profiles created by Ethiopia’s rich soils, high altitudes, and traditional farming methods. From sourcing our selection of sun-dried green coffee beans to our careful local roasting, every step honors a true farm-to-cup experience , delivering unparalleled freshness, authenticity, and a taste that tells the story of its origin.

Our Purpose
We aim to close the gap between mass-market coffee and authentic premium quality by sharing Ethiopia’s finest, single-source, organic coffee with the world.

Farm-to-Cup Business Model
Sourcing 100% organic, single-source Ethiopian green coffee, roasting locally, and serving premium beverages with authentic hospitality.

Farmers' Children Education
Kabod Coffee is supporting Ethiopian family farmers with fair-trade direct pay and aid programs that open the door to a better education environment for their children.

Our Farmers

Our Roastery

Our Cafés

Our Products

UNCOMPROMISING QUALITY

Our Beans: Roasted in Small Batches
for Peak Freshness & Smooth Flavors

We source 100% organic, single-source beans directly from small Ethiopian family farms, preserving the unique flavors of each region. By working closely with our farmers, we ensure exceptional quality while supporting ethical and sustainable practices.

We roast in small batches for peak freshness, then pack each batch immediately at our facility, locking in the rich aroma and smooth flavors. The result is the freshest, most flavorful farm-to-cup coffee delivered straight to you.

Shop Now

UNMATCHED FRESHNESS

Our Brews: Sip the Difference of
Farm-to-Cup Perfection

Our skilled baristas transform our premium roasted coffee beans into hand-crafted specialty beverages that celebrate both tradition and creativity.

From smooth cappuccinos and creamy lattes to rich mocha lattes served hot, iced, or blended, each cup is made to order with care and precision. Every sip delivers the authentic farm-to-cup experience our guests love, turning everyday coffee moments into something truly memorable.

Our Menu & Products

What is a True Farm-to-Cup Experience?

Direct farm sourcing, small batch roasting and brewed for you at our cafés with an unbroken chain of care from the time our raw green coffee beans are loaded at the source to the time you take your first sip.

Learn more

pages.text:
Home

Menu & Products

About

Locations

News

Online Store

✕

About Us

Kabod Coffee is more than just coffee — it’s a farm-to-cup experience rooted in Ethiopian heritage, uncompromising quality, and genuine hospitality. Learn more about our story, our values, and the passion behind every cup we serve.

OUR MISSION

To deliver a true farm-to-cup coffee experience rooted in Premium Single-Source Ethiopian Coffee heritage, uncompromising quality, and genuine hospitality — all while supporting local communities, empowering small farmers, and cultivating a culture of excellence, kindness, and integrity within every Kabod Coffee.

UNBLENDED PERFECTION®

What is Kabod Coffee?

Kabod Coffee was created to bridge the gap between the world’s coffee lovers and the small family farms of Ethiopia, the birthplace of coffee. From the very beginning, our mission has been to provide the finest coffee directly to the consumer — without the middleman — while honoring and uplifting the farmers who grow it. By sourcing directly from our small family farms, we pay farmers fairly for their harvests and ensure their hard work is rewarded with fair-trade prices. Each batch of coffee we source remains single-origin and completely unblended, allowing the unique flavor profiles of Ethiopia’s rich coffee regions to shine through in every cup.

FAIR TRADE. SINGLE SOURCE. TRULY EXCEPTIONAL COFFEE.

Our farm-to-cup journey is carefully designed to preserve the integrity of the coffee from its origin to your hands. It begins with purchasing sun-dried green coffee beans straight from our farmers, then importing them sealed in specialized hermetically sealed sacks that lock in flavor and freshness. From there, we roast our specialty coffee beans in small batches at our own Kabod Coffee roasteries, never blending across regions , so that every roast highlights the authentic character of its origin. Each step is carried out with precision and care, ensuring that the heritage and quality of Ethiopian coffee is never compromised.

Finally, we complete the circle by packaging our coffee fresh for customers at home and for brewing in our own cafés. Every bag and every cup of Kabod Coffee represents the same uncompromising commitment to excellence: from the farmer’s hands, to the roastery, to the moment you take your first sip. This is the true farm-to-cup experience — one that connects people across continents, celebrates tradition, and delivers the world’s best coffee directly to you.

KABOD COFFEE IS MAKING A DIFFERENCE

Our Farmers & Their Communities

Our mission goes beyond exceptional coffee — it’s about creating lasting impact in the communities where our journey begins. True sustainability means investing in people, not just products. That’s why we support programs that empower women in entrepreneurship and provide opportunities for families and their children through improved education. By fostering leadership, innovation, and access to resources for women, and by helping provide school supplies, meals, and classroom improvements for children, we are working to strengthen entire communities in Ethiopia — the birthplace of coffee and the heart of our mission.

EMPOWERING WOMEN IN ENTREPRENEURSHIP

Kabod Coffee is proud to partner with the Ethiopia Entrepreneurs Network to help empower women in the very farming communities where our coffee begins . By supporting programs that foster innovation, entrepreneurship, and leadership, we aim to create opportunities for women to thrive as business owners, leaders, and decision-makers in agriculture. Our involvement not only ensures fair trade and direct sourcing but also helps build stronger, more resilient communities where women are recognized for their value and given the tools to succeed. Through this commitment, Kabod Coffee is making a meaningful difference — from the farmer’s hands to the future of Ethiopia’s entrepreneurial landscape.

HELPING TO IMPROVE FARMERS' KIDS EDUCATION

We are deeply committed to giving back to the farming communities that make our work possible. Beyond paying farmers fair trade prices, we are proud to support their children by providing financial assistance to improve educational opportunities and their school environment. This includes helping with school supplies, meals, and classroom improvements — ensuring that children have the resources they need to learn, grow, and succeed. By investing in education, we are not only supporting individual families but also strengthening entire communities, creating a brighter future for them and their families.

WHERE HERITAGE MEETS HOSPITALITY

Our Small-Batch Roasteries & Cafés

Our approach is defined by intention, discipline, and an uncompromising respect for the craft. From how our beans are roasted to how each cup is brewed, every decision is rooted in preserving authenticity, freshness, and single-origin integrity. By maintaining complete control over our roasting process and committing exclusively to single-source Ethiopian coffee in our cafés, we ensure that every experience reflects the highest standard of quality.

A PERFECT BREW STARTS WITH A PERFECT ROAST. ONE SMALL BATCH AT A TIME.

At Kabod Coffee, freshness and quality guide every step of our roasting and packaging process. We operate our own roastery, where every batch of coffee is roasted in small quantities to preserve the unique character and vibrant flavor profiles of our single-source Ethiopian beans. Unlike mass production, our small-batch approach ensures careful attention to detail, consistency in every roast, and the ability to highlight the distinct qualities of each region we source from. Once roasted, every pound of Kabod Coffee is packed fresh — sealed immediately to lock in aroma and flavor — and then shipped directly to our cafés and retail partners. This hands-on process allows us to maintain complete control from farm to roastery to cup, guaranteeing that every bag of Kabod Coffee delivers the uncompromising freshness and excellence our customers deserve.

OUR CAFÉS BREW ONLY OUR 100% SINGLE-SOURCE ORGANIC COFFEE

Our cafés are built on a promise of integrity and authenticity — serving only our own 100% organic, single-source Ethiopian coffee. Every drink we craft begins with beans sourced directly from small family farms, never blended with other coffees , so that the true character of each region shines through in every sip. From classic cappuccinos and lattes to specialty creations, our baristas are trained to highlight the natural richness, aromas, and flavors that make our coffee unique. This commitment to purity ensures that every cup reflects the highest standards of quality, integrity, and care — staying true to the bean, the farmer, and the heritage behind it.

Kabod Coffee is a Denver, Colorado based specialty coffee brand rooted in the rich heritage of Ethiopian single-source, 100% organic coffee.

The word Kabod means a powerful declaration of God's glory and reflects the idea of something elevated, meaningful, and worthy of reverence, which aligns beautifully with the essence of the Kabod Coffee brand — carrying depth, value, and purpose in everything we do.

Unblended Perfection®

Visit Us • Contact Us

We love hearing from you! Whether you have a question, feedback, or just want to say hello, our team is here and ready to help. We’re committed to responding quickly and making sure you get the answers you need — because your experience matters to us.

Our Café Locations

Kabod Coffee is proudly serving guests at multiple locations across Denver, Colorado and beyond — with more on the way as we continue to grow. Stop by, sip your favorite brew, and see why our farm-to-cup experience is worth the trip.

Denver, Colorado

Denver International Airport,
Main Terminal - Floor 6

8500 Peña Blvd, Denver, CO 80249

Phone: (303) 342-6344

Address: 2Q96+35, Addis Ababa

SEND US A NOTE

Reach out to us via our email form here...

Your voice matters to us. If you have a question, comment, or idea, we’re eager to hear it! Reach out anytime and our friendly team will get back to you quickly — because connecting with our guests is one of our favorite parts of what we do.
